zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Isabel Loring於大約1350年出生在英國貝德福爾哈爾格拉福時，她的父親Neil Loring31歲，母親Margaret Beaupel28歲。她於1362年1月11日與William Cogan在英國戴文巴普頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1400年8月21日在英國藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆享年51歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾哈爾格拉福。

英国英格兰藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Isabel Loring于大约1350年出生在英国貝德福爾哈爾格拉福时，她的父亲Neil Loring31岁，母亲Margaret Beaupel28岁。她于1362年1月11日与William Cogan在英国戴文巴普頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1400年8月21日在英国藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆享年51岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾哈爾格拉福。

nameMeanings.name: Loring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorne
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the district of Lorn (Argyll).
English: perhaps a shortened form of Loring , a surname which is well evidenced in medieval southwestern England, where Lorne is later recorded.

variants.name: Lorraine
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Isabel Loring was born about 1350, in Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, England, her father, Neil Loring, was 31 and her mother, Margaret Beaupel, was 28. She married William Cogan on 11 January 1362, in Bampton, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 21 August 1400, in Aldingham, Lancashire, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Isabel Loring est née environ 1350, à Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Neil Loring, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Beaupel, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William Cogan le 11 janvier 1362, à Bampton, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 21 août 1400, à Aldingham, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Isabel Loring um 1350 in Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Neil Loring 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret Beaupel 28. Sie hat am 11. Januar 1362 in Bampton, Devon, England William Cogan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 21. August 1400 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Aldingham, Lancashire, England und wurde in Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabel Loring è nata il circa 1350 nel Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, Neil Loring, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margaret Beaupel, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato William Cogan il 11 gennaio 1362, nel Bampton, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 21 agosto 1400, nel Aldingham, Lancashire, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Isabel Loringが約1350年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアチャルグラブで生まれた時，父Neil Loringは31歳，母Margaret Beaupelは28歳であった。1362年1月11日にイギリスデボンバンプトンでWilliam Coganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1400年8月21日にイギリスランカシュアイアアルディンガムで51歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアチャルグラブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Isabel Loring(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 베드퍼드실르 차그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Neil Loring(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Beaupel(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1362년 1월 11일 영국 데폰 바프턴에서 William Cogan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1400년 8월 21일 영국 랭카실르 알딩함에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 차그레이브에 묻혔다.

Aldingham, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabel Loring nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Neil Loring, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Beaupel, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com William Cogan em 11 de janeiro de 1362, em Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 21 de agosto de 1400, em Aldingham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Isabel Loring родилась около 1350 г. в местности халграв, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Neil Loring было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Beaupel, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Cogan 11 января 1362 г. в местности бамптон, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 21 августа 1400 г. в местности алдингхам, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности халграв, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Isabel Loring nació aproximadamente 1350, en Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Neil Loring, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Beaupel, tenía 28 años. Se casó con William Cogan el 11 de enero de 1362, en Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 21 de agosto de 1400, en Aldingham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
